title: LASG Applauds Unveiling of CLS Coop Solution For Cooperative Societies - FinancialEDGE
description: The director Lagos State Government Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Cooperative,has applauded the CLE Coop Solution which is aimed to ease the management of cooperative societies. html:
The director  Lagos State Government Ministry of Commerce, Industry and Cooperative,has applauded the CLE Coop Solution which is aimed to ease the management of cooperative societies.

At the unveiling on Thursday, in Lagos, the director who was represented by Ayo Adekunle, Area Coordinator Surulere Cooperative Area office, noted that the unique features of the product will bring a lot of innovation in activities of cooperative societies in the state and Nigeria.

The product, which is designed by CLE Digital Services Limited, a subsidiary of First Registrars Services Limited, is set to make its mark in the fintech and software space. .

Adekunle, who endorsed the product, urged the promoter of CLE Solution to develop  strategies on how to reach out to grass root cooperative societies, because they are prone to challenges, which the product can address seamlessly for their members.

In his welcome address at the unveiling ceremony, First Registrars and Investors Services Limited, Managing Director / Chief Executive Officer, Dr. Bayo Olugbemi said, the product is geared towards being a game changer in the financial service industry.

Adding that the creation of the product which went through a three years strenuous process and tested, will definitely change the narrative in the digital solution for cooperative societies space.

In his presentation of the product, the Business Manager, Mr. Oladipupo Olabisi said that the Clé Coop Solution represents a significant milestone in the cooperative industry, offering a comprehensive suite of features tailored to meet the diverse needs of cooperative organizations across various sectors.

Olabisi explained that “From multipurpose societies to housing cooperatives and agricultural cooperatives, the Clé Coop Solution empowers cooperatives of all sizes to efficiently manage their operations, communicate with members, and foster collaboration.

According to him “In its bid to enhance the experience of Cooperator’s and Cooperative Societies at large, Clé Digital Services Limited has committed a significant investment in the development of the CLÉ COOP which now brings the services and relevance of being a member of a cooperative society to the fingertips of the Members, Administrators, and Executives of Cooperative societies.

He pointed out that with Clé, members can easily get on board, pay their monthly contribution, track their cooperative activities, such as loans, savings, investments and even track dividends paid by their cooperative society and a whole lot more.

On his part, Mr. Ezekiel Oni, Clé Director hinted that “Service Excellence is at the center of our operations and Clé Coop Solution is built to suit any cooperative society in the world as it has robust features to cater for all categories of members and societies”.

Clé Coop can be accessible via Web, the Mobile App will be unveiled soon (on Apple and Android enabled devices), as well as USSD (for registered users).

It also has notification features that enables members to know when there are new items for ‘Credit Sales’, events concerning their cooperative society, and other announcements Excos of any Cooperative Society may want to make known to its members.

Other notable features of the Clé Coop Solution include its Document Repository feature that allows for important documents such as bylaws, meeting minutes, and policies for easy access and reference by users.

Also, it has a secure modern financial management system that aids in streamlining financial transactions, track expenditures, and generate comprehensive financial reports for better decision-making.

Oni urged “cooperative societies to visit www.cle.ng to learn more about Cle Cooperative Management Solution, how to get their Cooperative Society onboarded and other value-added services embedded in the Solution”
